body:
## Dealix Now — تشغيل الشركة الآن

Bridges the gap between Dealix's already-deep engine and its website. The backend has 900+ routes and a real lead/scoring/draft engine; the doctrine (`os/`) is fully specified — but the website did not surface any live operating output, and `os/05_SCORING.yml` was never wired to code. This PR closes both gaps with one coherent, **deterministic, key-free** slice that makes the company runnable daily.

### What this delivers
- **`/ar/now` — Founder Operating Console** (Arabic RTL): today's operating pack — metrics, top‑3 priorities, scored leads with tier badges, and outreach **drafts awaiting founder approval**. Approving only *prepares* the message (mailto / WhatsApp deep links); **nothing is auto-sent**. Honors the doctrine: *AI يكتب، أنت ترسل*.
- **`/ar/services`** — full productized catalog (10 offers from `os/03_OFFERS.yml`) with SAR pricing + CTAs.
- **`dealix/now/` engine** *(landing in this branch)* — deterministic: loads repo lead data, scores per `os/05_SCORING.yml` (finally wired to code), routes the offer per `os/01_CLAUDE.md`, writes approval-first drafts (≤150 words, one pain, one CTA, no pricing), runs the Email Safety check, assembles the Founder Daily Brief (`os/10`), and logs every approve/reject to an append-only ledger.
- **`/api/v1/now/*`** public read API + **`scripts/dealix_now_daily.py`** for the daily brief, with doctrine-enforcing tests.

### Doctrine compliance (11 non-negotiables)
- ✅ No auto-send — drafts only; `status = "draft — awaiting founder approval"`.
- ✅ No scraping — sourced from committed repo data only.
- ✅ Approval-first — founder approves, then sends manually.
- ✅ Every decision logged. ✅ No secrets, no LLM keys required (fully deterministic).

### Notes
- `apps/web/lib/*` was force-added: the repo-wide `.gitignore` `lib/` rule (a Python build-artifact convention) was silently hiding the web app's source `lib/` dir, which would break a clean CI build.
- Frontend builds green (29/29 static pages). The console fetches the live API and falls back to a committed static `/now-pack.json`, so the site works with or without a backend.

Draft — backend engine commit lands next on this branch; will mark ready once tests are green here.

https://claude.ai/code/session_01NTMkaZutBeZMqPHebt6NtH

---
_Generated by [Claude Code](https://claude.ai/code/session_01NTMkaZutBeZMqPHebt6NtH)_

commits.messageBody:
…r/services)

Bridges the existing Dealix engine to the website — the missing front door.

- /ar/now: Arabic RTL console «غرفة القيادة — الآن» rendering the daily
  operating pack (metrics, top-3 priorities, scored leads with tier badges,
  and outreach drafts awaiting founder approval). Approve only PREPARES the
  message (mailto/WhatsApp deep links) — nothing is auto-sent. Honors the
  doctrine: AI writes, you send («AI يكتب، أنت ترسل»).
- /ar/services: full productized catalog (10 offers from os/03_OFFERS.yml)
  grouped by category with SAR pricing and CTAs.
- lib/api.ts: live API (NEXT_PUBLIC_API_URL + /api/v1/now/pack) with a static
  /now-pack.json fallback so the site works with or without a backend.
- now-pack.json: real sample computed from repo data, scored per
  os/05_SCORING.yml (Madar Logistics 80/100, etc.).
- ar/page.tsx: link the console + services from hero and footer.

force-add apps/web/lib/* — the repo-wide gitignore 'lib/' rule was hiding the
web app's source lib dir, which would break a clean CI build.

https://claude.ai/code/session_01NTMkaZutBeZMqPHebt6NtH
commits.messageHeadline: feat(web): Founder Operating Console (/ar/now) + services catalog (/a…

commits.messageBody:
The engine behind /ar/now. Turns the os/ doctrine into a runnable daily pack
with zero external keys (no LLM, no network), honoring all 11 non-negotiables.

- dealix/now/: seed (24 deduped targets from repo data) -> scoring
  (os/05_SCORING.yml, now wired to code) -> offer routing (os/01_CLAUDE.md)
  -> company brief -> approval-first outreach draft (<=150 words, one pain,
  one CTA, no pricing) -> email-safety check -> Founder Daily Brief (os/10)
  -> append-only decision ledger. Nothing is ever auto-sent.
- api/routers/now.py: public-read GET /api/v1/now/{pack,leads,drafts,
  daily-brief,metrics}; POST .../approve|reject log-only and return
  founder-operated mailto/WhatsApp links (founder sends manually).
- scripts/dealix_now_daily.py + `make now-daily`: writes the daily brief and
  refreshes the website snapshot apps/web/public/now-pack.json.
- tests/test_now_engine.py: 38 doctrine-enforcing tests (draft status string,
  no pricing in drafts, scoring bounds, offer routing, ledger never sends,
  routes registered). ruff + black clean.
commits.messageHeadline: feat(now): deterministic daily founder engine + /api/v1/now API + tests

commits.messageBody:
Both Repository Hardening checks were red on main (not this branch's code) and
neither scan actually ran:

- Gitleaks: gitleaks-action@v2 requires a paid GITLEAKS_LICENSE for GitHub orgs
  and aborted. Switch to the free open-source gitleaks CLI honouring
  .gitleaks.toml. Extend the allowlist for synthetic test credentials (e.g.
  sk_live_abcd… that a test asserts is redacted), the repo's own
  secret-detection verify scripts (which embed sk_live_/ghp_ grep patterns),
  and generated/vendored trees. Verified locally: 0 leaks.
- Trivy: aquasecurity/trivy-action@0.24.0 was yanked upstream and no longer
  resolves; track @master like the docker-build workflow.

Once Trivy resolves it flags CVE-2025-29927 (CRITICAL middleware authorization
bypass) in Next.js 15.1.3 across both web apps. Bump apps/web and frontend to
15.5.18 (patched line, matching the dependabot target); both `next build` runs
verified green and a local Trivy fs scan (CRITICAL,HIGH, ignore-unfixed) now
reports clean.
commits.messageHeadline: fix(ci): repair pre-existing security scans + clear Next.js CVE

commits.messageBody:
…ter coverage

Adds 10 synchronous TestClient tests covering every route in
api/routers/now.py: GET /pack, /leads, /drafts, /daily-brief (markdown
+ json), /metrics, and POST approve/reject (valid draft + 404 path).

Router coverage rises from 37.88% to 100%, closing the gap that risked
dropping the api package below the 70% --cov-fail-under gate.

https://claude.ai/code/session_01NTMkaZutBeZMqPHebt6NtH
commits.messageHeadline: test(now): add TestClient endpoint tests for /api/v1/now/* → 100% rou…

commits.messageBody:
- ledger.py: sanitize CR/LF from user-provided draft_id/actor before
  logging (CWE-117 log injection) via _safe_log() helper.
- Remove unused module-level `log` (and orphaned `import logging`) from
  the now router and 7 engine modules; none of them logged.
- seed.py: drop unused _EXPECTED_COLUMNS constant (kept `log`, which
  warns on a missing CSV).

All 48 now-engine tests pass; api/routers/now.py stays at 100% coverage.

https://claude.ai/code/session_01NTMkaZutBeZMqPHebt6NtH
commits.messageHeadline: fix(now): resolve CodeQL alerts — log injection + dead globals

commits.messageBody:
Trivy fs runs vuln + secret scanners by default. The secret scanner
false-positives on the literal `sk_live_…` regex patterns inside the
project's own scripts/*_verify.sh secret-detection scripts, and it does
not honour .gitleaks.toml. Gitleaks (the dedicated secret-scan job)
already covers secrets with that allowlist, so restrict Trivy to
`scanners: vuln` — its real job here is dependency/CVE scanning.

https://claude.ai/code/session_01NTMkaZutBeZMqPHebt6NtH
commits.messageHeadline: fix(ci): scope Trivy fs scan to vulnerabilities only

title: feat: Dealix Now — daily founder operating console + deterministic engine
